description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, angular green leaves arranged in a dense, upward-spreading cluster. The leaves are stylized and geometric, giving the plant a modern, low-poly appearance. The pot is a dark, glossy brown with a gently flared rim and a rounded, tapering base, suggesting a ceramic or plastic material. There are no visible decorative patterns or textures on the pot, which appears smooth and unadorned. The plant itself resembles a common indoor ornamental species, such as a Dracaena or similar broad-leafed houseplant. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad, angular green leaves in a dark, glossy, plain pot. The plant has a modern, stylized appearance and no visible decorations or labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dense, angular arrangement of green leaves and the full, rounded shape of the dark, glossy pot.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the layered structure of the leaves and the smooth, reflective surface of the pot.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the overlapping leaves and the pot's gentle flare at the rim.
description_view_3: Rear view with a clear view of the leaf arrangement and the pot's continuous, unadorned surface.
